description: Multi-turn lifecycle: create -> update topics -> disable -> delete (covers update + disable + delete).

turns.user: Add an MQTT broker: name edge-broker, host 10.0.0.50, port 1883.
Change this connector's topic subscription to 'edge/+/telemetry'.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind connector create --name edge-broker --host 10.0.0.50 --port 1883` (--type defaults to mqtt), and parses the ID
expectations.overall: Last three turns must reuse the ID parsed from turn 1
